title: Hidden & Misleading Traps
subtitle: Interview traps across all topics
description: The questions designed to catch smart developers off guard. 20 traps covering closure capture, async void, decimal vs double, DbContext thread safety, and more — with detailed explanations of why they fool people.
learningOutcomes: Spot closure capture bugs before they ship
Know the only correct use of async void
Never confuse decimal and double in financial code
